title: Thriving Through Uncertainty - Navigating NSF Proposal Submission — D-RED Seminar Slides (PRISSEM)
display_label: Thriving Through Uncertainty: NSF Submission Slides (2025-05-14)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2025-05-14 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Thriving Through Uncertainty — Navigating the Process to Submit Proposals to the National Science Foundation' presented by Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Addresses navigating NSF proposal submission during organizational change at the foundation. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/3uaLosywvtozyWFSHLghrLzdlmvoXmkEmHPcLMKfFAn5PWu3G7v9iUz3BQ7rK1hs.nR1nERYNYS_psJvZ
